title: BOM Line
description: BOM Line v1 contract for ingredients, anchor rice, packaging, and materials. Ratio-to-rice is captured where the source formula defines it.
$comment: Sources: PACK-03 rice anchor and ratio_to_rice rules. TODO: unit conversion catalog and density handling are not finalized.

line_type.description: Line type used by formula, MRP, and packaging calculations.

material_group.description: Material group if the line participates in MRP or stock policy.

material_planning_policy_id.description: Owner-approved material planning policy reference when this line participates in MRP or stock policy.

usage_role.description: Line-level usage role for canonical materials that appear in multiple recipe/BOM roles. The canonical ingredient/material identity remains ingredient_id.

ratio_to_rice.description: Ratio calculated as standardized quantity / standardized rice quantity * 100%. Required by policy for Group A pilot formula ingredients when applicable.

usage_basis.description: Usage basis when ratio_to_rice is not available, for example liters/ml without density config. TODO: define allowed usage basis values.

is_anchor_rice.description: True for the rice anchor line.
